description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The backrest is gently curved and features a row of subtle button tufting, adding a touch of classic elegance. The seat consists of three large, plush cushions, with the left side extending outward to form a chaise lounge section. Both the seat and backrest are thickly padded, providing ample comfort for lounging or sitting. The armrests are rounded and integrated into the frame, with a slight outward flare for ergonomic support. The chaise stands on six short, turned wooden legs with a natural finish, giving it a sturdy yet stylish appearance.
description: A light gray, L-shaped chaise with button-tufted backrest, plush cushions, and short wooden legs. The design is modern and comfortable, with a classic touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, button-tufted backrest, three seat cushions, and all six wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the extended chaise lounge section and the rounded armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the alignment of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the main seating area, the right armrest, and the depth of the chaise section.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, gently curved, and features a row of evenly spaced button tufting for a classic look. It is continuous across the main seating area and the chaise section, providing full back support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, rounded and integrated into the frame, with a slight outward flare.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, turned, and made of wood with a natural finish. They are slightly tapered and spaced evenly for stability, with a simple, classic design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray fabric with a smooth texture and button tufting on the backrest. No visible patterns or prints are present.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached seat cushions arranged in an L-shape, with the leftmost cushion forming the chaise section. The cushions are thick and plush, providing a uniform seating surface.
